center.name: Mimika River
center.summary: Mimika River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括金肩果鸠，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: On New Guinea, individuals have infrequently been recorded in the southwest from the Mimika River to the Noord River, but these are thought to have been vagrants from the Aru Islands. The species inhabits lowland forests near rivers and the coast, including mangroves, forest edges, savanna, gallery forests, and monsoon forests
